description_long: This emergency worker is dressed in a full-body pink jumpsuit with a hood that covers the head entirely, leaving only a black face mask with a white square symbol visible. The suit is cinched at the waist with a black utility belt, which holds two black pouches on either side. The arms and legs of the suit are slightly puffed, and the worker wears black gloves and black boots. There are black patches on the upper arms, and the suit appears to be made of a durable, matte fabric. The overall appearance is uniform and anonymous, with no visible personal identifiers.
description: A pink-hooded emergency worker in a full-body jumpsuit with a black face mask, utility belt, gloves, and boots.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pink jumpsuit, black face mask with a white square, utility belt, and pouches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, arm patch, and the side pouches on the belt.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, the cinched waist, and the back of the boots and gloves.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm patch, side pouches, and the suit's profile.
attribute_uniform_type: A full-body, hooded jumpsuit in bright pink fabric with a matte finish, featuring black synthetic gloves, boots, a black utility belt with pouches, and black arm patches. The suit is loose-fitting with elastic cuffs at the wrists and ankles, and the hood fully covers the head.
attribute_badge_or_insignia: white square symbol on the black face mask
black rectangular patches on upper arms
attribute_helmet_or_headgear: A pink fabric hood fully covering the head, paired with a black face mask featuring a white square symbol; no hard helmet or additional headgear is visible.
